postcode-lookup - 1 Request in the folder
Iteration: 1 - Lookup address details by postcode
Request Description
Returns street, city and state for a given country/postcode/house number. The underlying source is configurable: a local faker driver (default) or an external HTTP service (e.g. a WireMock stub) when POSTCODE_LOOKUP_DRIVER=http.
Request Information
Request Method: GET
Request URL: https://api.practicesoftwaretesting.com/postcode-lookup?country=string&postcode=string&house_number=string
Response Information
Response Code: 200 - OK
Mean time per request: 377ms
Mean size per request: 128B
